---
title: "2. Extract microclimate data"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# ======================
# Packages and data 
# ======================
## Load packages
```{r packages}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(tools)
library(terra)
library(raster)
library(sf)
library(starsExtra)
library(exactextractr)
library(spatialEco)
library(MultiscaleDTM)
library(corrplot)

source("r/helper_functions.R")

projCRS <- 26913
pops <- c("JP_NorthEast","JP_NorthWest","JP_SouthEast","JP_SouthWest","JP_TopEast","JP_TopWest",
          "NR_LowerSouth","NR_UpperSouth","NR_LowerNorth","NR_UpperNorth","NR_LowerTop","NR_UpperTop",
          "GP_LowerSouth","GP_UpperSouth","GP_LowerNorth","GP_UpperNorth","GP_LowerTop","GP_UpperTop")

gp_1m <- rast("data/1m_3DEP/Guanella_1mDEM.tif")
jp_1m <- rast("data/1m_3DEP/Jones_1mDEM.tif")
nr_1m <- rast("data/1m_3DEP/Niwot_1mDEM.tif")

pop_info <- st_read("data/natural-demography-plots.gpx",layer = "waypoints") %>%
  st_transform(crs = projCRS) %>%
  mutate(easting = st_coordinates(.)[,1],
         northing = st_coordinates(.)[,2]) %>%
  dplyr::select(pop=name,easting,northing)

pop_info$elev <- NA
pop_info$site <- NA

for(i in 1:nrow(pop_info)){

 if(str_detect(pop_info$pop[i], "JP")) dem_1m <- jp_1m else
 if(str_detect(pop_info$pop[i], "GP")) dem_1m <- gp_1m else
 if(str_detect(pop_info$pop[i], "NR")) dem_1m <- nr_1m else
   print("Something is wrong")

 if(str_detect(pop_info$pop[i], "JP")) pop_info$site[i] <- "Jones Pass" else
 if(str_detect(pop_info$pop[i], "GP")) pop_info$site[i] <- "Guanella Pass" else
 if(str_detect(pop_info$pop[i], "NR")) pop_info$site[i] <- "Niwot Ridge"

  pop_info$elev[i] <- terra::extract(dem_1m, cbind(pop_info$easting[i],pop_info$northing[i]))[,1] %>% round()
};rm(i)

# write_csv(as.data.frame(pop_info) %>% select(-geometry),"data/pop_info.csv")
# pop_info <- read_csv("data/pop_info.csv")
pop_info_sf <- st_as_sf(pop_info, coords = c("easting","northing"), crs = projCRS)
pop_info$lat_dd <- st_coordinates(st_transform(pop_info_sf, 4326))[,2]
rm(pop_info_sf)
```

## load data: 1 cm dems and shapefiles
```{r data}
dem.fns <- list.files("data/dems",full.names = T,recursive = T)
marker.fns <- list.files("data/shapefiles",full.names=T,recursive = T,pattern = ".shp")

# Make sure there are 18 when all shapefiles are uploaded
pops <- intersect(file_path_sans_ext(basename(dem.fns)),
                     file_path_sans_ext(basename(marker.fns)))
sample.size <- 0
for(pop in pops){
  
  site = ifelse(str_detect(pop,"JP"),"Jones",
                ifelse(str_detect(pop,"GP"),"Guanella",
                       ifelse(str_detect(pop,"NR"),"Niwot",
                              "Something is wrong")))
  
  tmp.ras <- rast(paste0("data/dems/",site,"/",pop,".tif"))
  tmp.shp <- read_sf(paste0("data/shapefiles/",site,"/",pop,".shp")) %>% 
    dplyr::select(-FID)
  
  ras.mask <- filter(tmp.shp,
                          str_detect(NAME,"corner")) %>% 
    summarize() %>% 
    st_convex_hull() %>% 
    st_buffer(.,1)

  tmp.plants <- tmp.shp %>% 
    filter(!str_detect(NAME,"corner"),
           !str_detect(NAME,"scale"),
           !str_detect(NAME,"tie"),
           !str_detect(NAME,"GCP"),
           !str_detect(NAME,"TR")) %>% 
    rename(plantID=NAME) %>% 
    mutate(pop=str_sub(string = pop,4,end = nchar(pop)),
           site=site)
  sample.size <- sample.size+nrow(tmp.plants)
  tmp.ras.crop <- crop(x = tmp.ras,y = ras.mask) %>% 
    mask(.,ras.mask)
  
  # plot(tmp.ras.crop,main=pop);plot(tmp.plants$geometry,add=T)
  # cat("\n",pop,res(tmp.ras.crop),"\n")
  
  assign(x = paste0(pop,"_ras"),value = tmp.ras.crop)
  assign(x = paste0(pop,"_plants"),value = tmp.plants)
  
}
rm(site,pop,tmp.shp,tmp.ras,tmp.ras.crop,tmp.plants,ras.mask)
```

# ======================
# Extract microtopography variables
# ======================
```{r extract_microtopo}

radii_m <- c(0.1, 0.3, 0.5)

for(pop in pops){

  cat(pop, "\n")

  points <- get(paste0(pop, "_plants"))
  dem_terra <- get(paste0(pop, "_ras"))

  site <- ifelse(str_detect(pop,"JP"),"Jones",
                 ifelse(str_detect(pop,"GP"),"Guanella","Niwot"))

  dem_trend <- rast(file.path("data/dems", site, paste0(pop, "_trend.tif")))
  lat_dd <- pop_info$lat_dd[pop_info$pop == pop]

  # Terrain rasters
  micro_terrain <- terra::terrain(dem_terra, v = c("slope","aspect"), unit = "degrees")
  trend_terrain <- terra::terrain(dem_trend, v = c("slope","aspect"), unit = "degrees")

  micro_east <- sin(micro_terrain[["aspect"]] * pi/180)
  micro_north <- cos(micro_terrain[["aspect"]] * pi/180)
  trend_east <- sin(trend_terrain[["aspect"]] * pi/180)
  trend_north <- cos(trend_terrain[["aspect"]] * pi/180)

  hli_ras <- spatialEco::hli(dem_terra)
  pins_ras <- p_insol(dem_terra, lat_dd)

  # Point elevation
  buf_pt <- st_buffer(points, 0.01)
  points$elv_pt <- exact_extract(dem_terra, buf_pt, fun = "mean", progress = FALSE)

  # Trend vars at 30 cm only
  buf_30 <- st_buffer(points, 0.3)
  points$slpT_30 <- exact_extract(trend_terrain[["slope"]], buf_30, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
  points$aspT_30 <- exact_extract(trend_terrain[["aspect"]], buf_30, fun = w_circ_mean_deg, progress = FALSE)
  points$estT_30 <- exact_extract(trend_east, buf_30, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
  points$nrtT_30 <- exact_extract(trend_north, buf_30, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)

  # Population-level eastness/northness from full trend DEM
  points$pop_est <- as.numeric(global(trend_east, "mean", na.rm = TRUE))
  points$pop_nrt <- as.numeric(global(trend_north, "mean", na.rm = TRUE))
  points$pop_slp <- as.numeric(global(trend_terrain$slope, "mean", na.rm = TRUE))
  
  # Per-radius extraction
  for(rad in radii_m){

    buf <- st_buffer(points, rad)
    sfx <- rad * 100

    # Slope, aspect, eastness, northness from detailed DEM
    points[[paste0("slp_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(micro_terrain[["slope"]], buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
    # points[[paste0("asp_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(micro_terrain[["aspect"]], buf, fun = w_circ_mean_deg, progress = FALSE)
    points[[paste0("est_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(micro_east, buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
    points[[paste0("nrt_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(micro_north, buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)

    # TPI (scale = radius in meters for 1 cm DEM)
    tpi_r <- spatialEco::tpi(dem_terra, scale = rad, win = "circle")
    points[[paste0("tpi_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(tpi_r, buf_pt, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)

    # TRI (TRIrmsd: normalized by cell count)
    s_i <- as.integer(round(rad * 100 * 2 + 1))
    tmp_tri <- terra::focal(dem_terra, w = matrix(1, s_i, s_i),
                            fun = function(x) {
                              center_idx <- length(x) %/% 2 + 1
                              sqrt(sum((x - x[center_idx])^2, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(!is.na(x)))
                            })
    points[[paste0("tri_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(tmp_tri, buf_pt, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)

    # Curvature
    win <- as.integer(round(rad * 100 * 2 + 1))
    q <- MultiscaleDTM::Qfit(r = dem_terra, w = c(win, win), metrics = c("profc","planc","maxc","meanc"))
    points[[paste0("plcv_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(q$planc, buf_pt, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
    points[[paste0("prcv_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(q$profc, buf_pt, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)

    # HLI and potential insolation
    points[[paste0("hli_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(raster(hli_ras), buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
    points[[paste0("pins_", sfx)]] <- exact_extract(pins_ras, buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)

  }

  assign(paste0(pop, "_plants"), points, envir = .GlobalEnv)
}
```

# ======================
# Mesoscale topography from 1m 3DEP DEM (population-level)
# ======================
```{r extract_mesotopo}

meso_tpi_radii <- c(10, 50, 500)

for(pop in pops){

  cat(pop, "\n")

  site <- ifelse(str_detect(pop,"JP"),"Jones",
                 ifelse(str_detect(pop,"GP"),"Guanella","Niwot"))

  # Pop centroid as terra SpatVector point
  pt <- pop_info[pop_info$pop == pop,]
  pt_vect <- vect(cbind(pt$easting, pt$northing), crs = paste0("EPSG:", projCRS))

  # Load and aggregate 1m DEM to 5m, cropped to area around pop (600m buffer for largest TPI radius)
  dem_1m <- if(str_detect(pop,"JP")) jp_1m else if(str_detect(pop,"GP")) gp_1m else nr_1m
  dem_5m <- aggregate(crop(dem_1m, buffer(pt_vect, 600)), fact = 5, fun = "mean")

  # Terrain from 5m DEM
  terrain_5m <- terra::terrain(dem_5m, v = c("slope","aspect"), unit = "degrees")
  east_5m <- sin(terrain_5m[["aspect"]] * pi/180)
  nrt_5m <- cos(terrain_5m[["aspect"]] * pi/180)

  # Slope, eastness, northness, curvature averaged within 50m of pop centroid
  buf_50m <- buffer(pt_vect, 50)
  ms_slp_50 <- mean(terra::extract(terrain_5m[["slope"]], buf_50m, fun = "mean")[,2], na.rm = TRUE)
  ms_est_50 <- mean(terra::extract(east_5m, buf_50m, fun = "mean")[,2], na.rm = TRUE)
  ms_nrt_50 <- mean(terra::extract(nrt_5m, buf_50m, fun = "mean")[,2], na.rm = TRUE)

  q_50m <- MultiscaleDTM::Qfit(r = dem_5m, w = c(21, 21), metrics = c("profc","planc"))
  ms_plcv_50 <- mean(terra::extract(q_50m$planc, buf_50m, fun = "mean")[,2], na.rm = TRUE)
  ms_prcv_50 <- mean(terra::extract(q_50m$profc, buf_50m, fun = "mean")[,2], na.rm = TRUE)

  # TPI at each radius
  meso_tpi <- setNames(numeric(length(meso_tpi_radii)), paste0("ms_tpi_", meso_tpi_radii))
  for(r in meso_tpi_radii){
    w <- (r / 5) * 2 + 1  # window width in cells
    focal_mean <- terra::focal(dem_5m, w = w, fun = "mean", na.rm = TRUE)
    tpi_r <- dem_5m - focal_mean
    meso_tpi[paste0("ms_tpi_", r)] <- terra::extract(tpi_r, pt_vect)[,2]
  }

  # Add all meso vars to every plant in this pop
  points <- get(paste0(pop, "_plants"))
  points$ms_slp_50 <- ms_slp_50
  points$ms_est_50 <- ms_est_50
  points$ms_nrt_50 <- ms_nrt_50
  points$ms_plcv_50 <- ms_plcv_50
  points$ms_prcv_50 <- ms_prcv_50
  for(nm in names(meso_tpi)) points[[nm]] <- meso_tpi[nm]

  assign(paste0(pop, "_plants"), points, envir = .GlobalEnv)
}
```

# ======================
# Save
# ======================
```{r save}

dir.create("data/output", showWarnings = FALSE)

all_plants <- bind_rows(lapply(pops, function(p) get(paste0(p, "_plants"))))%>% 
  st_zm(.)

saveRDS(all_plants, "data/output/allPops_microtopo.rds")
st_write(all_plants, "data/output/allPops_microtopo.shp")
write_csv(as.data.frame(all_plants) %>% dplyr::select(-geometry), "data/output/allPops_microtopo.csv")

cat("Saved", nrow(all_plants), "plants across", length(pops), "populations.\n")
```

# ======================
# Look at correlations in spatial data
# ======================

## First pass selection of microtopo variables based on correlations
```{r microtopo_corrs}

microtopo_dats <- read_csv("data/output/allPops_microtopo.csv") %>% 
  dplyr::select(-plantID,-elv_pt) 
  
remove_cols <- c(
  "slp_50",
  "pop_slp",
  "tri_50","tri_10",
  "tpi_50","tpi_10",
  "ms_tpi_500",
  "hli_50","hli_10",
  "slp_10","slp_50","slpT_30",
  "pop_nrt","pop_est",
  "nrt_10","nrt_50",
  "ms_nrt_50","nrtT_30",
  "est_10","est_50",
  "pins_50","pins_30","pins_10",
  "prcv_50",
  "slpT_30"
)

corr_dats <- microtopo_dats %>% 
  dplyr::select(-all_of(remove_cols)) %>% 
  group_by(site) %>% 
  group_modify(~ correlate(.x, quiet = TRUE) %>% stretch(na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(x,y) %>% 
  summarise(min_r = min(abs(r), na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>% arrange(-min_r)

ggplot(corr_dats,aes(x, y, fill = r, label = round(r, 2))) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(size = 2.5) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~site) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        axis.title = element_blank())

model_microtopo_dats <- microtopo_dats %>% 
  dplyr::select(-all_of(remove_cols))


model_microtopo_dats <- read_csv("data/output/allPops_microtopo.csv")%>% 
  dplyr::select(-all_of(remove_cols))

write_csv(model_microtopo_dats,"data/output/model_microtopo.csv")
```

# #####################
# Things below here 
# have been done, 
# saved or fixed
# ----------------------------------
## ===========
## Detrend DEMs 
## with starsExtra 
## ===========

```{r detrendDEMs}

for(pop in pops){

  site <- ifelse(str_detect(pop,"JP"),"Jones",
              ifelse(str_detect(pop,"GP"),"Guanella",
                     ifelse(str_detect(pop,"NR"),"Niwot",
                            "Something is wrong")))
  
  dem_terra <- get(paste0(pop,"_ras"))
  
  # Detrend raster to get average slope and aspect
  dem_stars <- st_as_stars(dem_terra)

  # starsExtra to detrend DEM
  dem_detrended_stars <- starsExtra::detrend(dem_stars)
  dem_detrended <- rast(dem_detrended_stars)[[1]]
  dem_trend <-  rast(dem_detrended_stars)[[2]]

  # Save detrended DEM and trend surface for future use
  writeRaster(dem_detrended,
              file.path("data/dems/",site,"/", paste0(pop, "_detrended.tif")),
              overwrite = TRUE)
  
  writeRaster(dem_trend,
              file.path("data/dems/",site,"/", paste0(pop, "_trend.tif")),
              overwrite = TRUE)
  
}
```

## ===========
## Check for duplicate 
## plant IDs
## ===========
```{r dupIDs}
# 
# duplicates <- NULL
# 
# for(pop in pops){
# 
#   tmp.shp <- get(paste0(pop,"_plants")) %>%
#     mutate(pop=pop) %>%
#     as.data.frame() %>%
#     group_by(pop,plantID) %>%
#     tally() %>%
#     filter(n>1)
# 
#   if(nrow(tmp.shp)>0){
# 
#     duplicates <- rbind(duplicates,tmp.shp)
#     rm(tmp.shp)
# 
#   }
# 
# }

```

# #####################
# Scratch
# ----------------------------------
# ======================
# Extract microtopography variables from 5cm aggregated DEM
# ======================
```{r extract_microtopo_5cm}

# for(pop in pops){
# 
#   cat(pop, "\n")
# 
#   points <- get(paste0(pop, "_plants"))
#   dem_terra <- get(paste0(pop, "_ras"))
#   dem_5cm <- aggregate(dem_terra, fact = 5, fun = "mean")
# 
#   lat_dd <- pop_info$lat_dd[pop_info$pop == pop]
# 
#   micro_terrain <- terra::terrain(dem_5cm, v = c("slope","aspect"), unit = "degrees")
#   micro_east <- sin(micro_terrain[["aspect"]] * pi/180)
#   micro_north <- cos(micro_terrain[["aspect"]] * pi/180)
# 
#   hli_ras <- spatialEco::hli(dem_5cm)
#   pins_ras <- p_insol(dem_5cm, lat_dd)
# 
#   buf_pt <- st_buffer(points, 0.01)
# 
#   for(rad in radii_m[radii_m > 0.1]){
# 
#     buf <- st_buffer(points, rad)
#     sfx <- rad * 100
# 
#     points[[paste0("slp_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(micro_terrain[["slope"]], buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
#     points[[paste0("asp_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(micro_terrain[["aspect"]], buf, fun = w_circ_mean_deg, progress = FALSE)
#     points[[paste0("est_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(micro_east, buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
#     points[[paste0("nrt_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(micro_north, buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
# 
#     tpi_r <- spatialEco::tpi(dem_5cm, scale = rad, win = "circle")
#     points[[paste0("tpi_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(tpi_r, buf_pt, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
# 
#     # TRI window in cells for 5cm DEM (rad / 0.05 cells per meter)
#     s_i <- as.integer(round((rad / 0.05) * 2 + 1))
#     tmp_tri <- terra::focal(dem_5cm, w = base::matrix(data = 1, nrow = s_i, ncol = s_i),
#                             fun = function(x) {
#                               center_idx <- length(x) %/% 2 + 1
#                               sqrt(sum((x - x[center_idx])^2, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(!is.na(x)))
#                             })
#     points[[paste0("tri_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(tmp_tri, buf_pt, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
# 
#     win <- as.integer(round((rad / 0.05) * 2 + 1))
#     q <- MultiscaleDTM::Qfit(r = dem_5cm, w = c(win, win), metrics = c("profc","planc","maxc","meanc"))
#     points[[paste0("plcv_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(q$planc, buf_pt, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
#     points[[paste0("prcv_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(q$profc, buf_pt, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
# 
#     points[[paste0("hli_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(raster(hli_ras), buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
#     points[[paste0("pins_", sfx, "_5")]] <- exact_extract(pins_ras, buf, fun = w_mean, progress = FALSE)
#   }
# 
#   assign(paste0(pop, "_plants"), points, envir = .GlobalEnv)
# }
```
